CustomField.description: Indicates whether the logged-in user is a Trainer (Internal or External).
CustomField.formula: ($User.ContactId != null && External_Trainer__c != null && $User.ContactId == External_Trainer__r.PersonContactId) || (Internal_Trainer__c != null && $User.Id == Internal_Trainer__r.Id)
CustomField.label: isRunningUserATrainer
